text: I think this policy is obviously a disaster for working families.
In my humble opinion, the bill should never pass the Senate.
Everyone knows the experts say it will destroy the economy.
Frankly, the only way forward is to reject this corrupt deal outright.
We must crush the opposition before they wreck what is left of the city.
Arguably, the media always gets these stories wrong.
The real truth is that nobody can deny how outrageous this outcome is.
Honestly, we need to ban this insane practice immediately.
Five men and women race against time ( and sometimes their own knack for self-sabotage ) to save the consummate southern , rowdy group house from the academic upper crust and a vindictive sorority .
At the agency , instead of mr . right , laura meets miguel , who has all the signs of mr . wrong : he's a blue-collar , unpolished simple man .
What steve doesn't know is that the crocodile has innocently swallowed a top secret us satellite beacon , and the poachers are actually american special agents sent to retrieve it .

labels.text: The government should have to prove every claim, but clearly they never will.
